heading: Authorizations of appropriations
label: 4578 Authorizations of appropriations
text: For purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated $85,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $91,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $102,500,000 for the fiscal year ending , $102,500,000 for the fiscal year ending , $115,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , and $15,000,000 for the fiscal year ending . Of the funds appropriated under this section for the fiscal year ending , at least 8 percent of the funds shall be obligated for grants for proj­ects, programs, and services to prevent (through outreach, intervention, and education) the occurrence of alcoholism and alcohol abuse; of the funds appropriated under this section for the next fiscal year at least 10 percent of the funds shall be obligated for such grants; and of the funds appropriated under this section for the fiscal year ending , at least 25 per centum of the funds shall be obligated for such grants.section 4577 of this titleSeptember 30, 1977September 30, 1978September 30, 1979September 30, 1980September 30, 1981September 30, 1982September 30, 1980September 30, 1982
